title: fix: update BPAI_PASSWORD for klein model
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Keys to the Klein
gist.blurb: Updated the secret passwords for the Klein 4B model so it can keep painting your pixels without a hitch.
gist.summary: Updated the encrypted authentication credentials for the Klein 4B image generation model.
gist.impact: Ensures the Klein model continues to authenticate and generate images successfully.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) holding a glowing pixelated key or a secret envelope, standing next to a chunky retro server rack or a vault. The Nomnom creature could be eating an old padlock.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) pixelated key next to a chunky retro server vault. The round nomnom creature is happily eating an old rusty padlock. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
